meta.title: 23456 — Claim your refund
meta.description: Submit a secure refund request in minutes. We locate your transaction and process your refund to the correct account.

hero.title: Get the refund you're owed
hero.subtitle: Fill in the form below with your details and proof of payment. Our team locates the transaction and issues your refund to the correct account.
highlights: Processed by a dedicated support team
Your data is encrypted and protected
Refund issued directly to your IBAN

home.formIntro: It only takes a couple of minutes. Have your invoice and bank details (IBAN) ready.

trust.heading: How it works
body: 1. Enter your phone number, email and bank details.
2. Upload your invoice and proof of bank details.
3. Confirm and submit — we open a ticket and get to work.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help with your refund request.
intro: If you have a question about an existing request or need help submitting one, reach out using the details below and our support team will get back to you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use and protect your personal data.

sections.heading: 1. Data we collect
body: When you submit a refund request we collect the phone number, email address and bank details (IBAN) you provide, together with any invoice or documents you upload.
We also collect basic technical information such as your IP address for security and fraud-prevention purposes.

sections.heading: 2. How we use your data
body: Your data is used solely to locate the relevant transaction, verify your request and process your refund.
We never sell your personal data to third parties.

sections.heading: 3. Data storage and security
body: Uploaded documents are stored privately and access is restricted to the support staff handling your request.
Data is retained only for as long as necessary to process your refund and meet our legal obligations.

sections.heading: 4. Your rights
body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us.
You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data-protection authority.

confidentiality.title: Confidentiality
confidentiality.subtitle: Our commitment to keeping your information private.

sections.heading: Confidential handling
body: All information you share with us as part of a refund request is treated as strictly confidential.
Only authorised members of our support team can view the details and documents attached to your request.

sections.heading: Secure transmission
body: Your submission is transmitted over an encrypted connection and your files are uploaded to private storage.
We apply the principle of least privilege: staff only access what they need to resolve your case.

sections.heading: No unsolicited contact
body: We will only contact you regarding your refund request. We do not use your details for marketing without your explicit consent.

footer.tagline: Secure refund processing you can trust.
